title: Two-pass package scope resolution
body:
Makes `V3LinkDot` revisit unresolved `::`-type `AstDot`s for a second pass. This helps resolve forward-declared or otherwise initially unknown scopes.

This patch fixes the UVM `component::type_id::create` pattern.

Does **not** fully fix #4705 – in that case, there's an additional problem of the identifier not being tagged as a type identifier during parsing.
